japanese.notes: trial port: dropped bg fill + colorOffset fg cycling; cell + bar width now mm params; inset ratio 0.28 kept as source const
dropped bg fill + per-cluster colorOffset cycling; hex outline + 6 spokes + 6 kite diamonds as mm polylines; star radius + line width mm params; hexRadiusFactor 0.9 folded into radius
dropped bg fill + colorOffset cycling; single stroke; up/down triangle interlace as mm polylines; triangle side + line width params; triScale 1.0 hardcoded
dropped bg fill + per-ring colorOffset cycling; nested upper-semicircle arcs in mm; fan radius + line width params, arcRings kept as signature knob
dropped bg fill + colorOffset cycling; kept step=radius interlock; radius + line width params, inner accent circle kept as signature knob (0=off)
2-colour up/down triangle scheme collapsed to fill only up-triangles (down gaps = real negative space, no bg paint); dropped bg fill + colorCount/colorOffset; scale width + aspect params
dropped bg fill + colorOffset cycling; single fg fill per mirrored chevron barb polygon; column width + barb height mm params; slant 0.7 kept as source const
dropped bg fill + colorOffset cycling; manji key-fret continuous polylines 1:1 in mm; cell + line width params; armReach 0.7 kept as source const
dropped bg fill + colorOffset cycling; square-spiral fret with (ix+iy) parity mirror ported 1:1; cell + line width params, turns kept as signature knob
removed no-op rand() wobble + colorOffset cycling + bg fill; plain brick-offset ring arcs in mm; ring radius + overlap + line width params
near-direct port; dropped bg fill + per-cell colorOffset pick; notched-square corner brackets in mm; cell + line width params; notch 0.18 kept as source const

ornament.notes: dropped bg-fill occlusion (both rotated squares now stroked as plain crossings) + center dot; single color; cell + line width mm params
single color: stars and interstitial crosses both filled (they sit in the alleys between stars, reading distinctly); dropped alpha-darkened outline pass + random palette picks; cell/starRatio params
no bg paint: over-under via split under-strand segments leaving real gaps at crossings; single color; dropped colorCount select + alpha highlight
redrawn as one even-odd path (region minus octagram + plus voids) instead of paint-over-bg; dropped redundant center-square void; cell + web-width mm params
single outlined 10-point star per cell; dropped concentric ring fills, decagon hub and alpha-darkened strokes; cell/pointDepth/line-width params
constructive Hamiltonian loop kept (deterministic); loop + pulli dots share one color; dropped dual color-index params; cell/line-width/dot-radius mm params
collapsed banded bg + per-band/per-cell color cycling to one fill; ctx.scale flip folded into coord math; stepUnit/steps/armThickness params
re-authored only the classic Greek key as a repeating stroked polyline (columns mirror to interlock); dropped all style/fill-mode selects, frames, decoration; cell + line-width params
over-under weave as real gaps (under-strands retracted at crossings) since zpd draw() has no bg color to paint; single strand color; tile/strandWidth/gridN mm params
each cell an even-odd hex ring (outer hex minus inner hex → real void) instead of a second-color inner-hex punch; dropped tint jitter + color cycling; radius + innerScale params

curves.notes: trial port: per-tile rand() orientation -> hash01 on center-origin indices; granularity -> mm tile pitch; px line width -> mm param; dropped bg fill
d2xy Hilbert polyline tiled into mm square cells (reads on tall panels); order capped 5, single stroke; dropped bg fill + per-segment color cycling + granularity
Heighway dragon (bit-reversal turns) auto-fit per mm cell and tiled; iterations capped 11; single stroke; dropped bg fill + color banding + granularity
plus-of-pluses fills tiled per mm cell (edge-mid cells connect neighbours); depth bounded 2-4; one fill color; dropped bg fill + per-depth palette shuffle + saltire toggle
sliding-ladder chord envelope of astroid stars, direct port; mm cell + line width + chord count; single stroke; dropped bg fill + per-cell fg cycling + granularity
360 straight chords over rose r=sin(n*theta) as a medallion grid; n and d fixed as params; thin full-opacity strokes; dropped webAlpha + rose outline + layer/degree randomization + granularity

hypotrochoid medallion per mm cell; r=R/(lobes+1) makes ratio integer so the curve closes in one revolution; R/lobes/pen distance fixed as params, steps capped 720; dropped withAlpha + multi-curve overlay + crop-beyond-bounds + granularity
quarter-disc lens fills, orientation via hash01 on center-origin indices; dropped bg field fill AND outline/darken pass (no bg paint) so gaps are real negative space; lens in one fg color
concentric gap-alternating arc walls + seed cross tiled per mm unit; one stroke color; dropped per-tile random color pick + colorOffset + granularity (no orientation state to hash)

closed-form outer+inner bounding circles + n chain circles per mm cell; rand() rotation offset fixed to 0; chain circles stroked in one fg color instead of multi-color fills; inner ratio hardcoded 0.4

ringsCircuits.notes: dropped bg fill + per-circle random color offset; radius=pitch flower-of-life relation kept; pitch + line width now mm params
dropped bg fill + fg-pool color cycling; step=1.42×radius interlock constant kept; radius + band width now mm params; odd-row half-step offset via center-origin row index
dropped bg fill + checkerboard color cycling; deterministic (col+row)%4 orientation cycle kept (center-origin indices); one flat fill; radiusRatio knob added over source radius=cell
dropped bg fill + fg-pool color cycling; four lobes filled as one non-zero-winding path (union); lobe offset 0.95×lobe kept as source const; cell + lobe radius now mm params
dropped bg fill + color cycling + lighten() on nodes; seeded per-edge rand -> hash01(ix,iy,edge) on center-origin indices; hex radius + trace width + coverage now params, node ratio 0.16 kept
dropped bg fill + darken(bg) hole paint + color cycling; annulus is real even-odd fill (outer disc minus inner disc) so holes show layers below; cell + ring radius + hole ratio now params
dropped bg fill + fg-pool color cycling; per-cell rand edge mask (<0.6) + pad roll -> hash01(ix,iy,channel) on center-origin indices; cell + trace width + pad chance now params
dropped bg fill + color cycling + seed-randomized defaults; fixed 6-fold frond geometry kept as source consts; cell + line width + flake size now params; brick-offset rows via center-origin row index
dropped bg fill + color cycling; 8-point star as filled 16-vertex polygon; long/short ray ratio kept as param; outer radius 0.46×cell kept as source const; cell now mm param

tilings.notes: dropped bg fill, per-brick color variation and highlight/shadow edge strokes; single flat fill with the inter-brick gap left as real negative space (no painted bg); brick length/width and gap are mm params
dropped bg fill and seeded fg pick; direct port of block + two tooth tabs on checker parity (keyed on center-origin indices); cell mm param + notch fraction knob
dropped bg fill and the one rand() color pick; two fillRect bars per cross; cell mm param + armLength fraction, arm thickness kept as source 0.5x ratio

dropped bg fill, cycling fg palette and accent stroke line; 2-color alternation collapsed to filled chevron band vs unpainted gap (constant gap since all ribbons share one V profile); pitch/amplitude mm + thickness knob

NO bg-halo pass (forbidden painted bg); strands cross plainly per porting note; three stroked triangle outlines per tile in one color; dropped bg fill, halo pass, per-cell rand color and darken accent
dropped bg fill and three separate family colors (collapsed to one stroke); +30/-30/vertical line families centered on panel center; cell + line width mm params

dropped bg fill, alternating fg colors and colorOffset; two-color tilework collapsed to a single stroked ogival outline lattice (no painted bg); tile width + line width mm + dome-height knob, shoulder kept as source const 0.55

near-direct single-color line port; four families at 0/45/90/135 with Fibonacci long/short (1/phi) gap walk; rand was consumed only for PRNG stability so dropped -> fully deterministic; spacing + line width mm, panel clip owns line extents

stroke the four pentagon outlines instead of 4-color fills (no painted bg); dropped bg fill, four fg colors and colorOffset; per-cell rand was PRNG-stability-only so removed; cell + line width mm, apex offset kept as source 0.28x ratio
dropped bg fill and per-ring color cycling / colorOffset; nested strokeRect squares on a centered grid in one color; cell + line width mm + integer nest-count knob
